subject: access enron bldg - week of march 18 thru march 24

emails.subject: FW: Access Enron Bldg - week of March 18 thru March 24
emails.subject_base: Access Enron Bldg - week of March 18 thru March 24
emails.body: FW: Access Enron Bldg week of March 18 thru March 24 What I would like to do is give Rita a temp badge every day. Do you see a problem with this? The most ability is responsibility. Nothing happens until someone steps forward and says, "You can count on me." Holly Strong Security System Coordinator Enron Corp Business Controls Office 713-345-3806 Cell 713-444-7368

emails.subject: RE: Access Enron Bldg - week of March 18 thru March 24
emails.subject_base: Access Enron Bldg - week of March 18 thru March 24
emails.body: RE: Access Enron Bldg week of March 18 thru March 24 Does that mean Rita will need to go through security every day? My preference is to give her a temporary badge or activate her old Enron badge for the full week.

emails.subject: RE: Access Enron Bldg - week of March 18 thru March 24
emails.subject_base: Access Enron Bldg - week of March 18 thru March 24
emails.body: Unfortunately, with her being a non-employee she will need to get a temp badge everyday. The other option would be to have her sign in as a visitor and have an escort. I will let the Security Kiosk know that she will be coming that week and to issue a temp badge. Thanks The most ability is responsibility. Nothing happens until someone steps forward and says, "You can count on me." Holly Strong Security System Coordinator Enron Corp Business Controls Office 713-345-3806 Cell 713-444-7368
